goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The root defect is disclosure opening, not card identity or product behavior. The intended moved/opened card remains selected, but openDetails samples once and clicks a positional first summary without verifying the final state across rerender.

worker_package.objective: Refactor only openDetails and all 21 call sites to exact summary names with strict uniqueness and retry-verified final open state, then complete all independent gates.
verify: Implement openDetails with exact visible summary name, details/summary count one, summary visibility, retry conditional click, and verified final open attribute; no positional/CSS/force/sleep/timeout/DOM mutation.
Update exactly 21 calls: Add Pantry item 2, Manage products and staples 1, Management beans 1, Manage locations 4, Cold room 1, Cold room shelf / Basket 1, Manage batch 11.
Preserve cards.first, actionForm and counts, every input/action/assertion/fixture/timeout/other locator.
Run scoped format/lint and one-file mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management workflow with all actions, three axe/overflow/screenshots, no browser errors.
Release port, fresh prepare, run integrated workflow with 400/350/50 and all provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history evidence, two axe, five screenshots, no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/dbcheck, release port, record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any exact summary/disclosure/final open state fails uniqueness.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: Snapshot proves cards.first is the intended moved/opened Cold room shelf batch while Manage batch is closed.
Current helper samples open once, uses summary.first, and never asserts final open state.
All 21 call sites have exact visible summary text.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, DB, artifacts, and port require serial lifecycles.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
